core_mechanism: threshold onset below a critical control parameter of a linear drive-to-response coupling (an order-parameter-like transition that switches on a proportional coupling between a source field and a probe, growing as the control parameter moves past the critical point) accompanied by broken reflection/parity symmetry so the coupling is direction-dependent (chiral)
brief_reason: The abstract reports that below a critical temperature a probe signal proportional to the applied drive velocity switches on and grows as temperature drops, while the effect is dominant for one rotation direction over its reverse, i.e. a critical-threshold emergence of a linear, parity-violating drive-response coupling.
